title: Activate Employee (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Activate Employee" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Activate Employee

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Activate Employee is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Activate Employee
business.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Activate Employee" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Activate Employee attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Activate Employee attempted by a role without permission
Activate Employee attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Activate Employee succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Activate Employee is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Activate Employee.
permissionTests: Activate Employee is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Activate Employee -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-06 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Activate Employee changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Activate Employee succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Activate Employee rejected with invalid data
Access: Activate Employee rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
